prompt: Can you write a project status update for the auth migration project? Sources: Slack channel #auth-migration and Jira project AUTH. I also want to include a screenshot — there's one at docs/screenshots/login-flow.png. Audience is the PM Sarah, going to #product-team. Cover the last 2 weeks.

assertions.text: Output includes a screenshot or image section referencing the provided file or noting it for attachment
Output mentions Slack and/or Jira as sources of information
Output uses Slack emoji section format (✅, 🔄, 👀 or similar)
Missing screenshot file is handled gracefully — noted for manual attachment rather than causing an error or being silently dropped
Output is addressed to the correct audience context (PM Sarah, #product-team)
